### One-Week Development Schedule: New App Feature

**Project Goal:** Develop, test, and stabilize the "User Profile Customization" feature.

| Day | Morning (9:00 AM - 12:30 PM) | Afternoon (1:30 PM - 5:00 PM) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Monday** | **Coding:** Environment setup, database schema design, and initial backend boilerplate. | **Coding:** Development of core API endpoints and data models. |

| **Wednesday** | **Coding:** Implementation of complex logic (e.g., image upload handling, validation rules). | **Coding:** Finalizing UI polish and responsive design adjustments. |
| **Thursday** | **Testing:** Unit testing for all new backend functions and frontend components. | **Testing:** Integration testing (ensuring the frontend and backend communicate correctly). |
| **Friday** | **Testing:** User Acceptance Testing (UAT) and bug identification. | **Coding/Testing:** Bug fixing, regression testing, and final code documentation. |<turn|>
